text: Digital India: Umbrella programme launched July 2015. ₹4.2 lakh crore investment. Pillars: broadband highways, universal mobile access, e-governance, e-Kranti, information for all, electronics manufacturing, IT for jobs.

Digital India — BharatNet: Optical fiber to 6.5 lakh gram panchayats. ₹42,000 crore. Phase 1 & 2: 1,94,000+ GPs connected. Phase 3 via satellite. Free WiFi in 84,000+ GPs. Digital divide reduction mission.

Digital India — DigiLocker: Digital documents platform. 30 crore users. 600 crore+ documents issued. Driving license, Aadhaar, PAN, certificates stored digitally. Accepted as valid documents. 2,900+ issuing organizations.

Digital India — UPI: India's real-time payment system. 1,300 crore monthly transactions. Value: ₹23 lakh crore/month (FY25). 424 banks on UPI. Global expansion: UAE, Singapore, France, Sri Lanka. NPCI-developed on IMPS platform.

Digital India — UMANG (Unified Mobile Application for New-age Governance). 1,700+ government services across 200+ departments. 7 crore+ downloads. PF, passport, income tax, PM-KISAN status tracking. One-stop governance app.

Digital India — IndiaStack: Open digital infrastructure. Components: Aadhaar (identity), UPI (payments), DigiLocker (documents), ABHA (health), CoWIN (vaccination), ONDC (commerce). Model adopted by 50+ countries.
